title: Joytale Reflective Dog Collar, Soft Neoprene Padded Breathable Nylon Pet Collar Adjustable for Medium Dogs, M, Navy Blue
features: SAFETY: Highly reflective threads keep high visibility at night for safety. And you can easy find your furry pet in the back yard at night
MATERIALS: Dog collar is made of nylon with thick neoprene padding on the back, making it soft. This prevents any irritation on the neck and makes it an all-weather dog collar

CLASSIC: This nylon dog collar is a classic yet stylish collar that comes in 12 colors and 5 sizes so you can find just the right one for your dog. A separate loop on the collar makes it easy to add dog tags and leads onto the collar
CONVENIENT: For quick release, the buckles are made of ABS plastic. The buckles allow the collar to adjust around the neck of the dog for ultimate comfort

SIZE: X-Small Width 1.5cm, Neck Size 20-28cm. Small Width 2cm, Neck Size 28-38cm. Medium Width 2.5cm, Neck Size 36-45cm. Large Width 2.5cm, Neck Size 40-60cm. X-Large Width 3cm, Neck Size 45-68cm. Suitable for puppy, small, medium and large dogs
description: Product Description Reflective Stitching Highly visibility with the two reflective threads on this collar. When cyclists and cars pass by, your dog's collar will be illuminated. Extra Small: 20-28cm - Recommended for small dogs e.g. Chihuahua Toy Poodle Maltese Yorkshire Terrier Small: 28-38cm - Recommended for adult small and young medium breeds dogs e.g. French Bull Dogs Dachshund Jack Russell Miniature Schnauzer Medium: 36-45cm - Recommended for young large dogs e.g. French Bulldog Beagle Boston Terrier Cocker Spaniel Large: 40-60cm - Recommended for adult large breeds dogs e.g. Golden Retriever Labrador Retriever Rottweiler Gilden Retriever Extra Large: 45-68cm - Recommended for extra large breeds dogs e.g. Great Dane English Mastiff Cane Corso German Shepherd Previous page Next page 1 Walking 2 Training 3 Traveling 4 City Walk Make sure to select the matching Joytale products to complete your buddies look!
